title: Benefits of hiring a specialist?
excerpt:

Are you unsure how to go about the process? 
Are you curious as to how you choose the right specialist?

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you considering getting external help with monday.com?
Are you unsure how to go about the process?
Are you curious as to how you choose the right specialist?
Are you worried about the time and cost?
Are you interested to hear more about the power of Integromat?

If any of the above questions feels relevant to you, we suggest you join our upcoming webinar on June 2.

Working with a specialist monday webinar1800×940 223 KB

The webinar is hosted by Omnitas Consulting and moderated by monday.com representative @Matias where we together with a live client will focusing on the power of using qualified help with monday.com and Integromat.

In this webinar, we will discuss the decision process leading up to working with external partners to develop optimized products as well as the collaboration to create innovative solutions that save both time and money.

Together with the awesome team from MyEllevate, Omnitas consulting built a complete automated workflow - in only 25 hours. All thanks to monday.com and the integrations made possible by Integromat.

We are fortunate to announce that Dawn from MyEllevate will be with us at the webinar and talk about their new Work OS, and give us an insight into how monday.com has streamlined their organization. I will also join in to explain the building process- specific challenges, the custom solutions and the results. The session will be hosted and moderated by @Matias, channel partner manager at monday.com.

You don’t want to miss this!

Link to recording:

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: A great topic for sure! Thanks for putting this on.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @Thomas-Omnitas - this is fantastic. Looking forward to it!

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml: Still room for more participants! I am sure it will be informational and help you decide if you want to work with a specialist going forward.

posts.author: Adriaan (Adriaan Schiphorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Thomas,

Missed this! Do you have a video recording?

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Adriaan!

We just finished the upload. Was going to update here.
Please follow this link to view the full webinar: The perks of working with a dedicated partner in monday.com - YouTube

We will be cutting a 10-15 min short version as well.

posts.author: NickAvalos (nick avalos)
posts.cookedHtml:
great suggestion and we could 100% use this,
what are the next steps and cost?

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NickAvalos!
Glad you like it

The next step is to book an initial exploratory meeting with @FredrikEricson where you will talk about your needs and what you are trying to achieve. We will also try and present an idea about costs in relations to your budget. You can book a time with him through this Calendly link.

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Thomas-Omnitas !

It’s a great topic for the webinar! Thanks for putting this on. I hope it will help entrepreneurs and business users understand how developing automated workflows on monday. com save both time and money. Automated workflows increase an enterprise’s ability to scale when they handle more tasks with reliable output. Workflow automation with monday .com keeps the team and workforce in compliance with any new procedures that might pop up and eliminate the possibility of delays and errors.

Moreover, when enterprises hire monday.com consultants, creation of complex automation workflows can be simplified. They can tactically use the platform and construct workflows that optimize business performance.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
